instruction: Copy only the directory hierarchy from /home/user/Desktop/source_tree to /home/user/Desktop/target_tree_hard recursively. Exclude any directory named tmp or .git and exclude any path under cache/. Do not copy any regular files. After finishing, create /home/user/Desktop/target_tree_hard/manifest_dirs.txt containing all copied relative directory paths, one per line, sorted alphabetically.
source: 外部参考来源：Canonical tutorial - Command line for beginners (https://ubuntu.com/tutorials/command-line-for-beginners)

command: import pyautogui, time; pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl','alt','t'); time.sleep(0.5)

result.command:
base=/home/user/Desktop/target_tree_hard; projectA_src='false'; [ -d "$base/projectA/src" ] && projectA_src='true'; projectB_api='false'; [ -d "$base/projectB/docs/api" ] && projectB_api='true'; projectC_sub='false'; [ -d "$base/projectC/empty/sub" ] && projectC_sub='true'; no_tmp='false'; [ ! -d "$base/projectA/tmp" ] && no_tmp='true'; no_git='false'; [ ! -d "$base/projectA/.git" ] && no_git='true'; no_cache='false'; [ ! -d "$base/projectB/cache" ] && no_cache='true'; files_count=$(find "$base" -type f ! -name manifest_dirs.txt | wc -l); no_files='false'; [ "$files_count" = '0' ] && no_files='true'; expected=$(printf 'projectA
projectA/src
projectB
projectB/docs
projectB/docs/api
projectC
projectC/empty
projectC/empty/sub
'); actual=$(cat "$base/manifest_dirs.txt" 2>/dev/null); manifest_match='false'; [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] && manifest_match='true'; echo "projectA_src=$projectA_src"; echo "projectB_api=$projectB_api"; echo "projectC_sub=$projectC_sub"; echo "no_tmp=$no_tmp"; echo "no_git=$no_git"; echo "no_cache=$no_cache"; echo "no_files=$no_files"; echo "manifest_match=$manifest_match"
